# IPTV Provider

> Premium IPTV service for the USA, Canada and worldwide: 54,000+ live TV
> channels and 120,000+ movies & series in HD/4K, streaming on any device.
> Instant setup, no contract, free 24-hour trial, 30-day money-back guarantee.
> Plans from $7.50/mo. Orders are completed over WhatsApp.

## Key pages

- [IPTV Smarters Pro subscription](https://www.iptvprovider.me/iptv-smarters-pro): Main page — plans, pricing, supported devices, how it works, and FAQ.
- [IPTV subscription plans](https://www.iptvprovider.me/iptv-subscription-plans): 1, 3, 6 and 12-month plans from $7.50/mo, compared side by side.
- [Free IPTV trial (2026)](https://www.iptvprovider.me/iptv-free-trial-2026): Apply for a free 24-hour trial. No credit card required.

## Guides

- [Learn IPTV](https://www.iptvprovider.me/learn): Hub of plain-English IPTV guides.
- [What is IPTV?](https://www.iptvprovider.me/learn/iptv-explained): Definition of IPTV, how it works, and how it compares to cable and satellite.
- [How to set up IPTV](https://www.iptvprovider.me/how-to): Install guides for every device.
- [Install IPTV on Firestick](https://www.iptvprovider.me/how-to/install-iptv-on-firestick): Step-by-step IPTV Smarters Pro setup on Amazon Firestick.

## Details

- Channels: 54,000+ live TV channels (sports, news, entertainment, international).
- On-demand: 120,000+ movies & series in HD and up to 4K, with a 7-day EPG.
- Devices: Amazon Firestick, Android TV boxes & phones, Smart TVs (Samsung/LG), Apple TV & iOS, Nvidia Shield, Windows, macOS, MAG boxes.
- Apps: IPTV Smarters Pro, TiviMate, IBO Player, XCIPTV.
- Payments: PayPal, USDT (TRC-20), and card (Visa/Mastercard) via WhatsApp checkout.
- Pricing: from $7.50/mo on the annual plan; also 1, 3, 6, 12 and 24-month terms.
- Trial: free 24-hour trial; reply within 1–30 minutes.
- Guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee.
- Support: 24/7 in English & Spanish via WhatsApp (+44 7848 197761) and support@iptvprovider.me.

## Contact

- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/447848197761
- Email: support@iptvprovider.me
